productDisplayName: Little Miss Girls Chatterbox Blue Clothing Set
description: Style NoteIf your little angel's mantra in life is to talk, talk, talk, and talk some more, this t-shirt and shorts set from little miss is perfect for her! Specially made for all the adorable little chatterboxes, this set is all she needs to tell the world that a little talkative magpie is in their midst! Team it with comfy footwearProduct DetailsBlue sleeveless round neck t-shirt, has graphic shimmery print on the front and white piping at the necklineBlue and white striped shorts that has a broad elasticated waistband with curved and rounded hems at the sides and graphic print above the left hemMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededLine dryCool iron do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
